description: Composition Grey track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, side pockets, adidas patented 3-Stripes in pink from the waistband to the hem, embroidered brand name on the left leg and is elasticated at the hem Fit Regular Wash care Normal wash cold inside out at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach or dry clean Line dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Chosen from the adidas fitness and sportswear range for women, these track pants add style to your look while you focus on performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these cotton-lycra pants allow easy movement and does not lose shape even after use. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
